properties.Test Case: Actually print a book: see if it folds properly and makes a book. "Half-letter" makes it easy to test with Letter paper.
properties.Steps: Actually print a book: see if it folds properly and makes a book. "Half-letter" makes it easy to test with Letter paper.

properties.Test Case: Change the Settings:Book Making:Page Numbering to something non-standard and ensure they are used in the PDF.
properties.Steps: Change the Settings:Book Making:Page Numbering to something non-standard and ensure they are used in the PDF.

properties.Test Case: Ensure Booklet PDF generation for Legal Landscape works. (Decided to live with this.)
properties.Steps: Ensure Booklet PDF generation for Legal Landscape works. (Decided to live with this.)

properties.Test Case: Make a full-bleed book (currently: by choosing Kyrgyz branding; Kyrgyz 2020 xmatter should be automatic). Make a full-bleed PDF. Open the output in Acrobat. Paper size should be about 6mm larger than A5 in both directions (154x216)--File/Properties. Turn on the preference in Acrobat (Edit/Preferences/PageDisplay/Show art, trim, & bleed boxes) to see trim lines and check they are 3mm inside page.
properties.Steps: Make a full-bleed book (currently: by choosing Kyrgyz branding; Kyrgyz 2020 xmatter should be automatic). Make a full-bleed PDF. Open the output in Acrobat. Paper size should be about 6mm larger than A5 in both directions (154x216)--File/Properties. Turn on the preference in Acrobat (Edit/Preferences/PageDisplay/Show art, trim, & bleed boxes) to see trim lines and check they are 3mm inside page.

properties.Test Case: make sure there are no extra or missing pages
properties.Steps: - make sure there are no extra or missing pages
